text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm getting some training
materials in order...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You know how a lot of my fans always call me
"cute," right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, guess what was written in the fan letter I got
today!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
"You were running faster than anyone else on the
turf! You were so cool!"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! If I keep this up...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Everyone will be calling me cool, just like Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All right! From now on, I'm gonna be the invincible and cool Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's Prez, walking around outside! I was wondering
where she was!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I gotta go talk to her! See ya later!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. When Prez sees my fan letter she's gonna
praise me so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio has showed some growth, but it seems
she's not quite ready to move on from her
beloved Prez.
